# Interledger.org

> Interledger Foundation stewards open technology that enables seamless exchange of value across payment networks. Banks, mobile money systems, fintech platforms, and networks can work together regardless of underlying technology or currency.

The site covers Interledger Protocol, Open Payments, Web Monetization, grants, and developer resources. 

## Docs

- [Developers Portal](https://interledger.org/developers/): Overview, Open Payments, Rafiki, ILP specs, Test Network
- [Interledger Protocol](https://interledger.org/developers/rfcs/interledger-protocol/): RFC and protocol specification
- [Open Payments](https://interledger.org/open-payments): API standard for payments interoperability
- [Web Monetization](https://interledger.org/web-monetization): Micropayments for web content

## Technology

- [Technology Overview](https://interledger.org/technology): Interledger, Open Payments, Web Monetization
- [Join the Network](https://interledger.org/join-network): How to connect

## Content

- [Foundation Blog](https://interledger.org/blog): Policy, grants, announcements
- [Tech Blog](https://interledger.org/developers/blog): Engineering blog

## Optional

- [About Us](https://interledger.org/about-us): Foundation mission and team
- [Grants](https://interledger.org/grants-for-web): Funding opportunities
